name: Jyotishka Roy
bio: A puzzle solver and voracious reader. A passionate robotics and rocketry engineer in the making. Driven by the interest in rocketry and robotics to strive for better results guided by reliable designs & data. Keen interest in details and analyzing every small thing to make better advancements in engineering fields.

name: Isabelo (Joe) Sibolboro
bio: An alumnus of Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University in Daytona Beach, Florida, and a dedicated high-power rocketry enthusiast, holding a Level 2 Certification through the National Association of Rocketry. Currently serve as an Engineer for the Northrop-Grumman Corporation. A great mentor helping students in all aspects of Aerospace Engineering.

name: Steve Lubliner
bio: An active hobby rocketeer for over 50 years.  Level 3 certified (able to fly M, N, and O motors) National Association of Rocketry (NAR) member.  NAR's Safety Committee Chairman.  Mentor ARC teams and collegiate rocketry teams (Intercollegiate Rocketry Engineering Challenge, IREC).
